settings.apiKey: Custom Last.fm API key. Not required but highly recommended to avoid rate limiting with our shared key
settings.clickableLinks: Make track, artist and album names clickable links
settings.hideWithSpotify: Hide presence if سبوتفاي is running
settings.hideWithActivity: Hide presence if you have any other presence
settings.statusName: Custom status text. You can use the following variables: {artist} | {album} | {title}
settings.statusDisplayType: Show the track / artist name in the member list
settings.nameFormat: Show name of song and artist in status name
settings.missingArt: When album or album art is missing
settings.showLogo: Show the scrobbler service logo by the album cover
settings.showAlbumCover: Show album cover. Disabling this will display a placeholder. Useful if your music has inappropriate art
